历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including Science) was approximately 8402→8474→10990→9067. In 2024, there was a significant backward shift, but it rebounded in 2025, with a baseline of about 9067 in 2025. The enrollment plan for this university in Ningxia for Physics Category was 12 students from 2022 to 2024, increased to 16 in 2025; in 2026, the plan is 13 students, a reduction of about 18.8% compared to 2025, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking approximately 120th (2026), with stable rankings between 116–122 in recent years; reputation has been stable recently, with no obvious negative public opinion or enrollment gaps; Douyin popularity total ranking 95th, rated as 'average', with short video platform attention at a lower-middle level; Food Science and Engineering is an A- discipline, the only A-class discipline at this university, directly corresponding to the Food Science and Engineering category in enrollment majors, attracting some interest for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Physics Category enrollment majors are mainly in agriculture, forestry, water conservancy, food, and biology. Related categories (biochemistry, environmental, materials, chemistry) still have low social popularity, while engineering majors like Electrical and Water Conservancy have relatively stable popularity; in 2026, the total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Ningxia is about 66,000, basically unchanged from 2025 (about 65,897), with overall competition stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the upward trend in rankings in 2025, the significant reduction in enrollment plan in 2026 (intensified competition), stable university reputation but low popularity of majors; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 8097, with a range of 7597–8597.
